retained_evidence: Event identifier, event type and occurrence time
excluded_content: Physiological values and raw signal samples

biomedical_accountability_question: Which facts are necessary for later accountability?
retained_evidence: Actor/emitter, pseudonymous subject, object roles, purpose and outcome

biomedical_accountability_question: Can equivalent metadata be represented consistently without direct identifiers?
retained_evidence: UTC timestamps, controlled codes and tokenised references
excluded_content: Emails, names, local paths and public commitment nonce

biomedical_accountability_question: Does one event-specific semantic branch hold?
retained_evidence: Closed event facts plus conditional policy/consent bindings

biomedical_accountability_question: Are the curated facts bound to deterministic bytes and an emitter identity?
failure_control: Canonicalisation vectors and signature mutation tests

biomedical_accountability_question: Can a verifier reconstruct local inclusion and bind the receipt to the evidence?
retained_evidence: Core/leaf digests, index, size, root, proof and receipt signature

biomedical_accountability_question: Can a retained verifier detect rollback or conflicting same-size roots?
retained_evidence: Evidence envelope, curation result and retained checkpoint
